api_key.description: Salesflare API key. Sent as Authorization: Bearer <api_key>; never logged.

base_url.description: Salesflare API base URL. Defaults to https://api.salesflare.com, matching legacy's in-code default. Also usable as a base URL override for tests/proxies.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
